category_sources: Official README describes certsync as a technique to dump NTDS remotely using golden certificates and UnPAC the hash: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
source_facts.description says it dumps NTDS with golden certificates and UnPAC the hash.
display_name_sources: Official repository name and README heading are certsync: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, usage, requirements, limitations, and OPSEC: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
repo_sources: Official GitHub repository page identifies zblurx/certsync as public source repository: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
tags_sources: Official README documents LDAP, CA certificate/key dumping, PKINIT, and domain controller options: https://github.com/zblurx/certsync
source_facts.description says NTDS, golden certificates, and UnPAC the hash.
